text: Please could you kindly help me understand how I would go about refactoring this function? I would like you to explain it in a way that is easy to understand. It is important to note that I am not very familiar with async/await patterns in JavaScript.
expected_intent: Explain how to refactor a function, noting unfamiliarity with async/await

text: Can you please take a look at this code and let me know if there are any bugs? I want you to be thorough. Please note that this code runs in production. In order to make your review more useful, please also note that performance is a concern due to the fact that we have a large number of users.
expected_intent: Review code for bugs; production context; performance matters due to scale

text: As an AI language model, I understand you have limitations, but could you please help me write a SQL query that in the event that the users table has more than 1000 rows, returns the top 10 users by created_at date? Kindly make it efficient.
expected_intent: Write an efficient SQL query returning top 10 users by created_at when table has >1000 rows

text: Write a TypeScript generic that constrains T to objects with a numeric `id` field, then maps an array of T to a Record<number, T>.
expected_intent: Write a TypeScript generic mapping array to Record by numeric id

text:
please note that this returns undefined:
```js
const x = async () => { return fetch('/api').then(r => r.json()) }
console.log(x())
```

expected_intent: Explain why logging the result of an async function prints a Promise, not the value
